name: Rich multi-source identity — text + doc + URL combined
description: User provides chat text, a doc, and a URL all in one inference call. Should produce the richest possible identity, no gaps.

inputs.text: I'm Marcus Liu, co-founder of Tessera. We're building a privacy-first analytics platform.

document_contents.content: Tessera Analytics. Founded 2024 by Marcus Liu (ex-Stripe data infra) and Sam Okafor (ex-Mozilla privacy team). YC W25. We give product teams the analytics they need without sending PII to third-party processors. Self-hosted option, EU residency by default, GDPR-native. Currently in design partner phase with three companies.

url_contents.content: Tessera — Analytics that respect your users. Built for product teams who care about privacy. Open core, self-hostable, EU-resident. Backed by Y Combinator. Series Seed open.
